\ottprodline{|}{\ottkw{type} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (  \ottmv{a} ,  \ottmv{b} ) = \{ \mathsf{Next}\mathord{:} \ottmv{a}  \mid \mathsf{Done}\mathord{:} \ottmv{b}  \} \in  \Sigma_c }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{a}  \in  \Phi }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{L}  \neq  \ottmv{L'} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ M  = \overline{ pat \mathord{:}  \tau , \cdot \to [\cdot][\cdot] \, se } }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{ce}  =  \mathcal{E}  [  \ottnt{ce'}  ] }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{D}  \neq  \ottmv{D'} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{x}  \neq  \ottmv{y} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{n}  =  \ottmv{k} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{eff}  =  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \vee  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{eff}  =  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \vee  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \vee  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{3}}}} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{eff}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \vee \, .. \, \vee \, \ottnt{eff_{\ottmv{n}}}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\Gamma  \ottsym{=}  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{eff_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{]}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{formula_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \quad .. \quad \ottnt{formula_{\ottmv{n}}}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}] \in  \Delta }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )] \in  \Delta }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  \in  \Delta }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{u}  \in \{1, ?\} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{u}  \in \{0, ?\} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{u}  =  \ottnt{u_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \sqcap  \ottnt{u_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{zero}( \Delta ) }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Gamma  = | \Delta | }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Gamma  = \mathsf{Bind}(\cdot;  \ottnt{Pf} ) }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathcal{C}  =  \Delta  \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}' }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{f} ( \ottkw{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}  \in  \Sigma_c }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{eff'}  \in \{\mathbf{S}, \lfloor  \ottnt{eff}  \rfloor\} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{RF}  \in  \Sigma_c }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{RF}  \in  \Sigma_r }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  \in  \Sigma_r }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{f} ( \ottkw{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}  \in  \Sigma_r }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{len}( \Delta ) = \mathsf{len}( \Delta' ) }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{A}  = \mathsf{Prod}( \overline{A} ) }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottu}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{u}}{::=}{\ottcom{usage flags}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ 0 }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ 1 }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathord{?} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottDelta}{
\ottrulehead{\Delta}{::=}{\ottcom{refined contexts}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ \cdot }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}] }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )] }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\Delta  \ottsym{,}  \Delta'}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottctxlist}{
\ottrulehead{\overline{\Delta}}{::=}{\ottcom{context lists}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{\Delta  \ottsym{;}  \overline{\Delta}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \cdot }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottsym{(}  \overline{\Delta}  \ottsym{)}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{;} \, .. \, \ottsym{;}  \Delta_{\ottmv{n}}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottCt}{
\ottrulehead{\mathcal{C}}{::=}{\ottcom{SMT constraints}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ \top }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{2}}} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \forall  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \tau . \,  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{ce} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \bot }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottsym{(}  \mathcal{C}  \ottsym{)}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottPf}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{Pf}}{::=}{\ottcom{proof sorts}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ \cdot }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau ,  \ottnt{Pf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}],  \ottnt{Pf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}],  \ottnt{Pf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ [  \ottnt{ce}  /  \ottmv{x}  ]  \ottnt{Pf} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottRF}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{RF}}{::=}{\ottcom{refined function types}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \multimap  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottq}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{q}}{::=}{\ottcom{refined patterns}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ () }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{q}  \ottsym{)}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottcrt}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{crt}}{::=}{\ottcom{core refined terms}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{\ottmv{x}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottmv{lit}}{}{}{}{\ottcom{integer literal}}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{blit}}{}{}{}{\ottcom{boolean literal}}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottkw{let} \, \ottnt{q}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{crt}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{Pf}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{prim} \, \ottnt{rsp}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{rsp}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottsym{(}  \ottnt{rsp}  \ottsym{)}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottkw{iter} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{ce}  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{q}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ottsym{\}}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottkw{if} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{ce} \, \ottkw{then} \, \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottkw{else} \, \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottkw{case} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{ce} \, \ottkw{of} \, \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}} \, \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{crt_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{exfalso} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{open\text{-}take}\; \ottnt{rpf} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottrsp}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{rsp}}{::=}{\ottcom{refined spines}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ \cdot }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{ce}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{rsp}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{rpf}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{rsp}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{lpf}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{rsp}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottlpf}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{lpf}}{::=}{\ottcom{logical proof facts}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{\ottmv{x}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{auto} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{unfold}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottnt{ce} ) }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{open\text{-}ret}\; \ottnt{rpf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{lpf}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{ce}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottrpf}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{rpf}}{::=}{\ottcom{resource proof facts}}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{\ottmv{x}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{make\text{-}ret}\; \ottnt{lpf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{make\text{-}take}\; \ottnt{crt} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{rpf}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottJtype}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{Jtype}}{::=}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash  \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{guarded} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{sort}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\} \;\mathsf{ok} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\} \;\mathsf{ok} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \tau  \;\mathsf{wf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{eqtype} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{eff}  \leq  \ottnt{eff'} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff}  \rfloor }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{eff}  =  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \vee  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \ottnt{prim}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau' }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  \vdash  \ottnt{cprog} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottJcore}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{Jcore}}{::=}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \in \, \Sigma_c}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottJelaborate}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{Jelaborate}}{::=}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \vdash  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \vdash  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottJmatch}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{Jmatch}}{::=}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ M  \ottsym{/} \ottmv{var} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ M  \ottsym{/} \ottkw{tup} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \overline{y}  ;  M  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathcal{E}  [  \ottnt{ce}  ] \leadsto  \ottnt{ce'} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottJrefine}{
\ottrulehead{\ottnt{Jrefine}}{::=}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottfirstprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Gamma  = | \Delta | }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathsf{zero}( \Delta ) }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \mathcal{C}  =  \Delta  \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}' }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \mathcal{C}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{Pf}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottnt{RF}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{RF} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \overline{A}  = \{ \ottnt{Pf} \} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r ) }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \vdash  \Sigma_r  \;\mathsf{wf} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta' }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  =  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}}  \sqcap  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  =  \Delta }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{q}  :  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \;\mathsf{is}\;  \ottmv{L} \, \ottmv{x}  \to  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :  \ottnt{RF}  \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{ \Sigma_r  \vdash \sqcap  \overline{\Delta}  =  \Delta }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottjudgement}{

\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{lpf}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{rpf}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottgrammar}{\ottgrammartabular{
\ottterminals\ottinterrule
\ottblit\ottinterrule
\ottA\ottinterrule
\ottAL\ottinterrule
\otteff\ottinterrule
\otttau\ottinterrule
\ottF\ottinterrule
\ottG\ottinterrule
\ottCS\ottinterrule
\ottSS\ottinterrule
\ottRS\ottinterrule
\ottPhi\ottinterrule
\ottprim\ottinterrule
\ottce\ottinterrule
\ottse\ottinterrule
\ottprog\ottinterrule
\ottcprog\ottinterrule
\ottpat\ottinterrule
\ottbinds\ottinterrule
\ottE\ottinterrule
\ottscrs\ottinterrule
\ottmbranches\ottinterrule
\ottformula\ottinterrule
\ottu\ottinterrule
\ottDelta\ottinterrule
\ottctxlist\ottinterrule
\ottCt\ottinterrule
\ottPf\ottinterrule
\ottRF\ottinterrule
\ottq\ottinterrule
\ottcrt\ottinterrule
\ottrsp\ottinterrule
\ottlpf\ottinterrule
\ottrpf\ottinterrule
\ottJtype\ottinterrule
\ottJcore\ottinterrule
\ottJelaborate\ottinterrule

\ottJrefine\ottinterrule
\ottjudgement\ottinterrule
\ottuserXXsyntax\ottafterlastrule
}}

% defnss
% defns Jtype
%% defn type_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfXXint}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash   \mathsf{int}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWf\_int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfXXbool}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash   \mathsf{bool}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWf\_bool}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfXXptr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash   \mathsf{ptr}\; \ottnt{A}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWf\_ptr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfXXrecord}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWf\_record}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{type} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c \quad  \ottmv{n}  =  \ottmv{k} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWf\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfXXtvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{a}  \in  \Phi }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottmv{a}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWf\_tvar}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefntypeXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{wf} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfXXint{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfXXbool{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfXXptr{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfXXrecord{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfXXtvar{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn type_guarded
\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfGXXint}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash   \mathsf{int}   \;\mathsf{guarded} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWfG\_int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfGXXbool}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash   \mathsf{bool}   \;\mathsf{guarded} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWfG\_bool}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfGXXptr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash   \mathsf{ptr}\; \ottnt{A}   \;\mathsf{guarded} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWfG\_ptr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfGXXrecord}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;\mathsf{guarded}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \;\mathsf{guarded} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \;\mathsf{guarded} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWfG\_record}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfGXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{type} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c \quad  \ottmv{n}  =  \ottmv{k}  \quad  \ottmv{D}  \neq  \ottmv{D'} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \;\mathsf{guarded} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWfG\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTWfGXXtvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{a}  \in  \Phi }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash  \ottmv{a}  \;\mathsf{guarded} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TWfG\_tvar}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefntypeXXguarded}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  ;  \ottmv{D'}  \vdash  \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{guarded} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfGXXint{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfGXXbool{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfGXXptr{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfGXXrecord{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfGXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTWfGXXtvar{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn sort_decl_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleSDWfXXok}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{  \Sigma_c , \mathsf{sort}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\}   ;   \overline{a}   \vdash  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad .. \quad   \Sigma_c , \mathsf{sort}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\}   ;   \overline{a}   \vdash  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{sort}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\} \;\mathsf{ok} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SDWf\_ok}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsortXXdeclXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{sort}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\} \;\mathsf{ok} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSDWfXXok{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn type_decl_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleTDWfXXok}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{  \Sigma_c , \mathsf{type}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\}   ;   \overline{a}   ;  \ottmv{D}  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;\mathsf{guarded}  \quad .. \quad   \Sigma_c , \mathsf{type}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\}   ;   \overline{a}   ;  \ottmv{D}  \vdash  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \;\mathsf{guarded} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\} \;\mathsf{ok} }{%
{\ottdrulename{TDWf\_ok}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefntypeXXdeclXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\} \;\mathsf{ok} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleTDWfXXok{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn sort_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleSWfXXint}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash   \mathsf{int}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SWf\_int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSWfXXbool}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash   \mathsf{bool}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SWf\_bool}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSWfXXptr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \tau  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash   \mathsf{ptr}\; \tau   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SWf\_ptr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSWfXXrecord}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SWf\_record}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSWfXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{sort} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c \quad  \ottmv{n}  =  \ottmv{k} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SWf\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSWfXXpred}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \tau  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SWf\_pred}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSWfXXtvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{a}  \in  \Phi }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \ottmv{a}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SWf\_tvar}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsortXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  ;  \Phi  \vdash  \tau  \;\mathsf{wf} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSWfXXint{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSWfXXbool{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSWfXXptr{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSWfXXrecord{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSWfXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSWfXXpred{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSWfXXtvar{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn eqtype
\newcommand{\ottdruleEqTyXXint}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathsf{int}   \;\mathsf{eqtype} }{%
{\ottdrulename{EqTy\_int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleEqTyXXbool}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathsf{bool}   \;\mathsf{eqtype} }{%
{\ottdrulename{EqTy\_bool}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleEqTyXXptr}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathsf{ptr}\; \ottnt{A}   \;\mathsf{eqtype} }{%
{\ottdrulename{EqTy\_ptr}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefneqtype}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{eqtype} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleEqTyXXint{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleEqTyXXbool{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleEqTyXXptr{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn subeff
\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{0}   \leq   \mathbf{0}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_pure\_pure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXimpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{0}   \leq   \mathbf{1}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_pure\_impure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXimpureXXimpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{1}   \leq   \mathbf{1}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_impure\_impure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXspec}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{0}   \leq   \mathbf{S}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_pure\_spec}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXspecXXspec}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{S}   \leq   \mathbf{S}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_spec\_spec}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsubeff}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottnt{eff}  \leq  \ottnt{eff'} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXimpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXimpureXXimpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXspec{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXspecXXspec{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn purify
\newcommand{\ottdrulePurXXpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{0}   = \lfloor   \mathbf{0}   \rfloor }{%
{\ottdrulename{Pur\_pure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePurXXimpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{0}   = \lfloor   \mathbf{1}   \rfloor }{%
{\ottdrulename{Pur\_impure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePurXXspec}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{S}   = \lfloor   \mathbf{S}   \rfloor }{%
{\ottdrulename{Pur\_spec}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnpurify}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff}  \rfloor $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePurXXpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePurXXimpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePurXXspec{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn eff_join
\newcommand{\ottdruleJoinXXrefl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottnt{eff}  =  \ottnt{eff}  \vee  \ottnt{eff} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Join\_refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleJoinXXpureXXimpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{1}   =   \mathbf{0}   \vee   \mathbf{1}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Join\_pure\_impure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleJoinXXimpureXXpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{1}   =   \mathbf{1}   \vee   \mathbf{0}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Join\_impure\_pure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleJoinXXpureXXspec}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{S}   =   \mathbf{0}   \vee   \mathbf{S}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Join\_pure\_spec}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleJoinXXspecXXpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{S}   =   \mathbf{S}   \vee   \mathbf{0}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Join\_spec\_pure}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefneffXXjoin}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottnt{eff}  =  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \vee  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{2}}}} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleJoinXXrefl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleJoinXXpureXXimpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleJoinXXimpureXXpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleJoinXXpureXXspec{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleJoinXXspecXXpure{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn prim_type
\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXadd}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Add}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{int}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_add}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Sub}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{int}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_sub}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXmul}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Mul}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{int}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_mul}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXdiv}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Div}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }   \mathsf{int}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_div}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXand}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{And}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{bool}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{bool}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_and}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXor}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Or}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{bool}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{bool}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_or}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXnot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Not}  \mathord{:}   \mathsf{bool}   \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_not}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXlt}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Lt}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_lt}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXle}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Le}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_le}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXgt}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Gt}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_gt}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXge}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Ge}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{,}   \mathsf{int}   \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_ge}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXeq}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{eqtype} }%
}{
 \ottkw{Eq} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_eq}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXnew}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{New} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }   \mathsf{ptr}\; \ottnt{A}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_new}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXdel}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Del} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}   \mathsf{ptr}\; \ottnt{A}   \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottsym{(}  \,  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_del}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXget}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Get} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}   \mathsf{ptr}\; \ottnt{A}   \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{A} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_get}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXset}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Set} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}   \mathsf{ptr}\; \ottnt{A}   \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottsym{(}  \,  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_set}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXown}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Own} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}   \mathsf{ptr}\; \ottnt{A}   \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }   \mathsf{pred}\; \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{)}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_own}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnprimXXtype}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottnt{prim}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXadd{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXsub{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXmul{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXdiv{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXand{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXor{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXnot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXlt{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXle{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXgt{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXge{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXeq{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXnew{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXdel{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXget{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXset{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXown{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXint}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{lit}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{int}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXbool}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{blit}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_bool}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau  \in  \Gamma  \quad  \ottnt{eff'}  \leq  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \Rightarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_annot}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{prim}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \to_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau' }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  \leq  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff''}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff''} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{prim} \, \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXcall}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \to_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau'  \in  \Sigma_c }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  \leq  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff''}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff''} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_call}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXeq}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{eqtype} }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }   \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \Rightarrow   \mathsf{bool}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_eq}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXint{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXbool{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXannot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXcall{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXeq{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn check
\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXlet}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \tau }%
\ottpremise{ \epsilon  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \epsilon }  \tau   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXtuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau_{\ottmv{n}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_tuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXlettuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \epsilon  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)} }%
\ottpremise{\Gamma'  \ottsym{=}  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{[}  \epsilon  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{[}  \epsilon  \ottsym{]}}%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \Gamma'  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottkw{let} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_lettuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXinject}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_inject}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXcase}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} }%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \in \, \Sigma_c}%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau''_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c \quad .. \quad \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau''_{\ottmv{n}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau''_{{\mathrm{1}}}   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau''_{\ottmv{n}}   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottkw{case} \, \ottnt{ce} \, \ottkw{of} \, \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}} \, \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_case}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXiter}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (  \ottmv{a} ,  \ottmv{b} ) = \{ \mathsf{Next}\mathord{:} \ottmv{a}  \mid \mathsf{Done}\mathord{:} \ottmv{b}  \} \in  \Sigma_c }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{A}   \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{B}  \ottsym{)} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottkw{iter} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_iter}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXif}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{bool}  }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottkw{if} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottkw{then} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \ottkw{else} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_if}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXreturn}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottkw{return} \, \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_return}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXtake}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau  }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau   \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau'  }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottkw{take} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau'  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_take}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXlet{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXtuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXlettuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXinject{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXcase{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXiter{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXif{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXreturn{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXtake{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn cprog
\newcommand{\ottdruleCProgXXmain}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash   \mathsf{main} :  \tau _{ \ottnt{eff} } =  \ottnt{ce}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{CProg\_main}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCProgXXpurefun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{A}   \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B} }%
\ottpremise{  \Sigma_c , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{A} ) \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  =  \ottnt{ce}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{A} ) \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  =  \ottnt{ce}  \quad \ottnt{cprog}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{CProg\_purefun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCProgXXimpurefun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}   ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{A}   \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{A} ) \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}  =  \ottnt{ce}  \quad \ottnt{cprog}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{CProg\_impurefun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCProgXXspecfun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \tau  \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'   ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau   \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }%
\ottpremise{  \Sigma_c , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}  \quad \ottnt{cprog}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{CProg\_specfun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCProgXXsortdecl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{sort}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\} \;\mathsf{ok} }%
\ottpremise{  \Sigma_c , \mathsf{sort}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash  \ottkw{sort} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}}  \ottnt{cprog} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CProg\_sortdecl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCProgXXtypedecl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\} \;\mathsf{ok} }%
\ottpremise{  \Sigma_c , \mathsf{type}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \vdash  \ottkw{type} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \ottnt{cprog} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CProg\_typedecl}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncprog}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  \vdash  \ottnt{cprog} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCProgXXmain{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCProgXXpurefun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCProgXXimpurefun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCProgXXspecfun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCProgXXsortdecl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCProgXXtypedecl{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJtype}{
\ottdefntypeXXwf{}\ottdefntypeXXguarded{}\ottdefnsortXXdeclXXwf{}\ottdefntypeXXdeclXXwf{}\ottdefnsortXXwf{}\ottdefneqtype{}\ottdefnsubeff{}\ottdefnpurify{}\ottdefneffXXjoin{}\ottdefnprimXXtype{}\ottdefnsynth{}\ottdefncheck{}\ottdefncprog{}}

% defns Jcore
%% defn ctor_lookup
\newcommand{\ottdruleCtorXXsort}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{sort} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c \quad  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau'  \in \mathrm{ctors}( \ottmv{D} ) \in  \Sigma_c  \quad \tau  \ottsym{=} \, \ottkw{subst} \, \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \tau'}%
}{
\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}{%
{\ottdrulename{Ctor\_sort}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCtorXXtype}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{type} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c \quad  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A'}  \in \mathsf{tyctors}( \ottmv{D} ) \in  \Sigma_c  \quad \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{=} \, \ottkw{subst} \, \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottnt{A'}}%
}{
\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A} \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}{%
{\ottdrulename{Ctor\_type}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnctorXXlookup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c$}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtorXXsort{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtorXXtype{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn decl_lookup
\newcommand{\ottdruleDLXXsort}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{sort} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}%
}{
\ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \in \, \Sigma_c}{%
{\ottdrulename{DL\_sort}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleDLXXtype}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{type} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}%
}{
\ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \in \, \Sigma_c}{%
{\ottdrulename{DL\_type}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefndeclXXlookup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$\ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \in \, \Sigma_c$}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleDLXXsort{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleDLXXtype{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJcore}{
\ottdefnctorXXlookup{}\ottdefndeclXXlookup{}}

% defns Jelaborate
%% defn surf_synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfSynXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau  \in  \Gamma  \quad  \ottnt{eff'}  \leq  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottmv{x} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfSyn\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfSynXXint}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{lit}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{int}   \leadsto  \ottmv{lit} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfSyn\_int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfSynXXbool}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{blit}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{bool}   \leadsto  \ottnt{blit} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfSyn\_bool}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \Rightarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce}  \ottsym{:}  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfSyn\_annot}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfSynXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{prim}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \to_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau' }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  \leq  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff''}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff''} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{prim} \, \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau'  \leadsto  \ottnt{prim} \, \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfSyn\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfSynXXcall}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \to_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau'  \in  \Sigma_c }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  \leq  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff''}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff''} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau'  \leadsto  \ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfSyn\_call}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfSynXXeq}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{A}  \;\mathsf{eqtype} }%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A}  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }   \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \Rightarrow   \mathsf{bool}   \leadsto   \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfSyn\_eq}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsurfXXsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfSynXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfSynXXint{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfSynXXbool{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfSynXXannot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfSynXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfSynXXcall{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfSynXXeq{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn surf_check
\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXlet}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \epsilon  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}   \cdot   ;  \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \to  \ottsym{[}   \cdot   \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}   [\cdot]   \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau'  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottkw{let} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau'  \leadsto  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXtuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{se_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)}  \leadsto  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_tuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXinject}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)}  \leadsto  \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_inject}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXcase}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \epsilon  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce'} }%
\ottpremise{ M  = \overline{ pat \mathord{:}  \tau , \cdot \to [\cdot][\cdot] \, se } }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}   \cdot   ;  M  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau'  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottkw{case} \, \ottnt{se} \, \ottkw{of} \, \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{se_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \tau'  \leadsto  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce'}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_case}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXiter}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (  \ottmv{a} ,  \ottmv{b} ) = \{ \mathsf{Next}\mathord{:} \ottmv{a}  \mid \mathsf{Done}\mathord{:} \ottmv{b}  \} \in  \Sigma_c }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottmv{z}  \ottsym{,}   \cdot   ;  \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{,}   \cdot   \to  \ottsym{[}   \cdot   \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}   [\cdot]   \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{B}  \ottsym{)}  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottkw{iter} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B}  \leadsto  \ottkw{iter} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{z}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ottsym{\}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_iter}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXif}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{bool}   \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottkw{if} \, \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottkw{then} \, \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \ottkw{else} \, \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottkw{if} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottkw{then} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \ottkw{else} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_if}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXreturn}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottkw{return} \, \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau   \leadsto  \ottkw{return} \, \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_return}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXtake}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau   \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}   \cdot   ;  \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \to  \ottsym{[}   \cdot   \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}   [\cdot]   \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow_{  \mathbf{S}  }   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau'   \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottkw{take} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau'   \leadsto  \ottkw{take} \, \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_take}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSurfChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SurfChk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsurfXXcheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXlet{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXtuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXinject{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXcase{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXiter{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXif{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXreturn{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXtake{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSurfChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn prog
\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXmain}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \vdash   \mathsf{main} :  \tau _{ \ottnt{eff} } =  \ottnt{se}   \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \vdash   \mathsf{main} :  \tau _{ \ottnt{eff} } =  \ottnt{ce}   \end{array} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_main}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXpurefun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  = \overline{ pat \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A} , \cdot \to [\cdot][\cdot] \, se } }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}   \cdot   ;  M  \Leftarrow_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
\ottpremise{ \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }   \Sigma_s , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f}  :  \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  = \{\overline{ \ottkw{pat}  \to  \ottkw{se} }\}   \vdash  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto   \Sigma_c , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{y}  :  \ottnt{A} ) \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  =  \ottnt{ce}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} }%
}{
 \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f}  :  \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  = \{\overline{ \ottkw{pat}  \to  \ottkw{se} }\} \quad \ottnt{prog}   \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{y}  :  \ottnt{A} ) \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  =  \ottnt{ce}  \quad \ottnt{cprog}   \end{array} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_purefun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXimpurefun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  = \overline{ pat \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A} , \cdot \to [\cdot][\cdot] \, se } }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}   ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}   \cdot   ;  M  \Leftarrow_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
\ottpremise{ \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}   \vdash  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} }%
}{
 \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f}  :  \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}  = \{\overline{ \ottkw{pat}  \to  \ottkw{se} }\} \quad \ottnt{prog}   \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{y}  :  \ottnt{A} ) \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}  =  \ottnt{ce}  \quad \ottnt{cprog}   \end{array} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_impurefun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXspecfun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  = \overline{ pat \mathord{:}  \tau , \cdot \to [\cdot][\cdot] \, se } }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \tau  \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'   ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}   \cdot   ;  M  \Leftarrow_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
\ottpremise{ \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }   \Sigma_s , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f}  :  \tau  \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'  = \{\overline{ \ottkw{pat}  \to  \ottkw{se} }\}   \vdash  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto   \Sigma_c , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{y}  :  \tau ) \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} }%
}{
 \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f}  :  \tau  \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'  = \{\overline{ \ottkw{pat}  \to  \ottkw{se} }\} \quad \ottnt{prog}   \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{y}  :  \tau ) \to_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}  \quad \ottnt{cprog}   \end{array} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_specfun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXsortdecl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{sort}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\} \;\mathsf{ok} }%
\ottpremise{ \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }   \Sigma_s , \mathsf{sort}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\}   \vdash  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto   \Sigma_c , \mathsf{sort}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : \tau}\}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} }%
}{
 \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \vdash  \ottkw{sort} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}}  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \vdash  \ottkw{sort} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}}  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_sortdecl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXtypedecl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  \vdash \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\} \;\mathsf{ok} }%
\ottpremise{ \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }   \Sigma_s , \mathsf{type}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\}   \vdash  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto   \Sigma_c , \mathsf{type}\; \ottmv{D} (\overline{a}) = \{\overline{L : A}\}   \vdash  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} }%
}{
 \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \vdash  \ottkw{type} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \vdash  \ottkw{type} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_typedecl}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnprog}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \begin{array}{ @{} l @{} }  \Sigma_s  \vdash  \ottnt{prog}  \\ \quad \leadsto  \Sigma_c  \vdash  \ottnt{cprog}  \end{array} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXmain{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXpurefun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXimpurefun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXspecfun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXsortdecl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXtypedecl{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJelaborate}{
\ottdefnsurfXXsynth{}\ottdefnsurfXXcheck{}\ottdefnprog{}}

% defns Jmatch
%% defn has_con
\newcommand{\ottdruleHCXXhere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }{%
{\ottdrulename{HC\_here}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleHCXXthere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }%
}{
 \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }{%
{\ottdrulename{HC\_there}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnhasXXcon}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleHCXXhere{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleHCXXthere{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn has_tup
\newcommand{\ottdruleHTXXhere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }{%
{\ottdrulename{HT\_here}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleHTXXthere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }%
}{
 \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }{%
{\ottdrulename{HT\_there}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnhasXXtup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleHTXXhere{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleHTXXthere{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn strip_var
\newcommand{\ottdruleSVXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \cdot   \ottsym{/} \ottmv{var} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \cdot  }{%
{\ottdrulename{SV\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSVXXcons}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \ottsym{/} \ottmv{var} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }%
}{
 \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/} \ottmv{var} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{;}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M' }{%
{\ottdrulename{SV\_cons}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnstripXXvar}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ M  \ottsym{/} \ottmv{var} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSVXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSVXXcons{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn spec_con
\newcommand{\ottdruleSCXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \cdot   \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \cdot  }{%
{\ottdrulename{SC\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSCXXmatch}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }%
}{
 \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M' }{%
{\ottdrulename{SC\_match}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSCXXskip}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{L}  \neq  \ottmv{L'}  \quad  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }%
}{
 \ottmv{L'} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }{%
{\ottdrulename{SC\_skip}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSCXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }%
}{
 \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottmv{z}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'   \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{;}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M' }{%
{\ottdrulename{SC\_var}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnspecXXcon}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSCXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSCXXmatch{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSCXXskip{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSCXXvar{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn expand_tup
\newcommand{\ottdruleETXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \cdot   \ottsym{/} \ottkw{tup} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \cdot  }{%
{\ottdrulename{ET\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleETXXtuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \ottsym{/} \ottkw{tup} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }%
}{
 \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{:}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/} \ottkw{tup} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M' }{%
{\ottdrulename{ET\_tuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleETXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \ottsym{/} \ottkw{tup} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' }%
}{
 \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/} \ottkw{tup} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottmv{z_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{z_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{)}   \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{;}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M' }{%
{\ottdrulename{ET\_var}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnexpandXXtup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ M  \ottsym{/} \ottkw{tup} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  M' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleETXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleETXXtuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleETXXvar{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn coverage
\newcommand{\ottdruleCovXXdone}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \Gamma'  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce'}  \quad  \ottnt{ce}  =  \mathcal{E}  [  \ottnt{ce'}  ] }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }   \cdot   ;   \cdot   \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma'  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{[}  \mathcal{E}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Cov\_done}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCovXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \ottsym{/} \ottmv{var} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \epsilon }  M' }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \overline{y}  ;  M'  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}  \overline{y}  ;  M  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Cov\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCovXXcon}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \in \, \Sigma_c}%
