\ottpremise{\ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau''_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c \quad .. \quad \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau''_{\ottmv{n}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}%
\ottpremise{ M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \mathord{:}  \tau''_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \epsilon }  M_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \quad .. \quad  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \mathord{:}  \tau''_{\ottmv{n}}  \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \epsilon }  M_{\ottmv{n}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,}  \overline{y}  ;  M_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{,}  \overline{y}  ;  M_{\ottmv{n}}  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}  \overline{y}  ;  M  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottkw{case} \, \ottmv{y} \, \ottkw{of} \, \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}} \, \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Cov\_con}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCovXXtup}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }%
\ottpremise{ M  \ottsym{/} \ottkw{tup} \overset{ \ottmv{y} }{\leadsto}_{ \epsilon }  M' }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{y_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{y_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{,}  \overline{y}  ;  M'  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{,}  \overline{y}  ;  M  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottkw{let} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{y_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{y_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Cov\_tup}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncoverage}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff_{{\mathrm{0}}}} }  \overline{y}  ;  M  \Leftarrow_{ \epsilon }  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCovXXdone{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCovXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCovXXcon{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCovXXtup{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn fill_ctx
\newcommand{\ottdruleFillXXhole}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  [\cdot]   [  \ottnt{ce}  ] \leadsto  \ottnt{ce} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Fill\_hole}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleFillXXlet}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathcal{E}  [  \ottnt{ce}  ] \leadsto  \ottnt{ce'} }%
}{
 \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce''}  \ottsym{;}  \mathcal{E}  [  \ottnt{ce}  ] \leadsto  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce''}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce'} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Fill\_let}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnfillXXctx}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \mathcal{E}  [  \ottnt{ce}  ] \leadsto  \ottnt{ce'} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleFillXXhole{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleFillXXlet{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJmatch}{
\ottdefnhasXXcon{}\ottdefnhasXXtup{}\ottdefnstripXXvar{}\ottdefnspecXXcon{}\ottdefnexpandXXtup{}\ottdefncoverage{}\ottdefnfillXXctx{}}

% defns Jrefine
%% defn rctx_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleRWfXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \cdot   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RWf\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRWfXXeff}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \ottnt{eff}  \leq   \mathbf{S}  }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RWf\_eff}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRWfXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{bool}  }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RWf\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRWfXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau   \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce'}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )]   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RWf\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrctxXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta  \;\mathsf{wf} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRWfXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRWfXXeff{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRWfXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRWfXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn ctx_erase
\newcommand{\ottdruleEraseXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \cdot   = |  \cdot  | }{%
{\ottdrulename{Erase\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleEraseXXeff}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta | }%
}{
  \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   = |  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  | }{%
{\ottdrulename{Erase\_eff}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleEraseXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta | }%
}{
 \Gamma  = |  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]  | }{%
{\ottdrulename{Erase\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleEraseXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta | }%
}{
 \Gamma  = |  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )]  | }{%
{\ottdrulename{Erase\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnctxXXerase}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Gamma  = | \Delta | $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleEraseXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleEraseXXeff{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleEraseXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleEraseXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn affinize
\newcommand{\ottdruleAffXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \cdot   = \mathsf{affinize}(  \cdot  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Aff\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleAffXXeff}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) }%
}{
  \Delta' ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   = \mathsf{affinize}(  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Aff\_eff}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleAffXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) }%
}{
  \Delta' ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]   = \mathsf{affinize}(  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Aff\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleAffXXresXXused}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) }%
}{
  \Delta' ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  0  )]   = \mathsf{affinize}(  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  0  )]  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Aff\_res\_used}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleAffXXresXXavail}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) }%
}{
  \Delta' ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  \mathord{?}  )]   = \mathsf{affinize}(  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  1  )]  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Aff\_res\_avail}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleAffXXresXXopt}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) }%
}{
  \Delta' ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  \mathord{?}  )]   = \mathsf{affinize}(  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  \mathord{?}  )]  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Aff\_res\_opt}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnaffinize}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleAffXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleAffXXeff{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleAffXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleAffXXresXXused{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleAffXXresXXavail{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleAffXXresXXopt{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn zero
\newcommand{\ottdruleZeroXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \mathsf{zero}(  \cdot  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Zero\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleZeroXXeff}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{zero}( \Delta ) }%
}{
 \mathsf{zero}(  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Zero\_eff}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleZeroXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{zero}( \Delta ) }%
}{
 \mathsf{zero}(  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Zero\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleZeroXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{zero}( \Delta )  \quad  \ottnt{u}  \in \{0, ?\} }%
}{
 \mathsf{zero}(  \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )]  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{Zero\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnzero}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \mathsf{zero}( \Delta ) $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleZeroXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleZeroXXeff{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleZeroXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleZeroXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn ctx_close
\newcommand{\ottdruleCloseXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \mathcal{C}  =   \cdot   \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Close\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCloseXXeff}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathcal{C}  =  \Delta  \Rightarrow   \forall  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \tau . \,  \mathcal{C}'  }%
}{
 \mathcal{C}  =   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Close\_eff}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCloseXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathcal{C}  =  \Delta  \Rightarrow   \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}'  }%
}{
 \mathcal{C}  =   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]   \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Close\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCloseXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathcal{C}  =  \Delta  \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}' }%
}{
 \mathcal{C}  =   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )]   \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}' }{%
{\ottdrulename{Close\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnctxXXclose}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \mathcal{C}  =  \Delta  \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCloseXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCloseXXeff{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCloseXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCloseXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn ct_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleCtWfXXtop}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \top   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CtWf\_top}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCtWfXXand}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{2}}}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{2}}}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CtWf\_and}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCtWfXXforall}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau   \vdash  \mathcal{C}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \forall  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \tau . \,  \mathcal{C}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CtWf\_forall}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCtWfXXimpl}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{bool}   \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \mathcal{C}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CtWf\_impl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCtWfXXatom}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{bool}  }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottnt{ce}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CtWf\_atom}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCtWfXXbot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \bot   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CtWf\_bot}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnctXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \mathcal{C}  \;\mathsf{wf} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtWfXXtop{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtWfXXand{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtWfXXforall{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtWfXXimpl{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtWfXXatom{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtWfXXbot{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn pf_wf
\newcommand{\ottdrulePfWfXXnil}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \cdot   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfWf\_nil}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfWfXXcomp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  \in \{\mathbf{S}, \lfloor  \ottnt{eff}  \rfloor\} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{Pf}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \tau ,  \ottnt{Pf}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfWf\_comp}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfWfXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{bool}   \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{Pf}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}],  \ottnt{Pf}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfWf\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfWfXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce'}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \tau   \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{Pf}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}],  \ottnt{Pf}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfWf\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnpfXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{Pf}  \;\mathsf{wf} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfWfXXnil{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfWfXXcomp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfWfXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfWfXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rf_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleRFWfXXrfun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;   \cdot   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \Gamma  = \mathsf{Bind}(\cdot;  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}} )  \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \multimap  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RFWf\_rfun}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrfXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottnt{RF}  \;\mathsf{wf} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRFWfXXrfun{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rsig_lookup
\newcommand{\ottdruleRSLkXXrfun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{RF}  \in  \Sigma_r }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{RF} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSLk\_rfun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSLkXXsig}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  \in  \Sigma_r }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}    \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau ,   \cdot    \multimap   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau' ,   \cdot    \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSLk\_sig}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSLkXXdef}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{f} ( \ottkw{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}  \in  \Sigma_r }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}    \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau ,   \cdot    \multimap   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau' ,   \cdot    \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSLk\_def}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrsigXXlookup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{RF} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSLkXXrfun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSLkXXsig{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSLkXXdef{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn pf_types
\newcommand{\ottdrulePfTysXXnil}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  []   = \{  \cdot  \} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfTys\_nil}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfTysXXpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \overline{A}  = \{ \ottnt{Pf} \} }%
}{
  \ottnt{A}  \mathord{::}  \overline{A}   = \{  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{A} ,  \ottnt{Pf}  \} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfTys\_pure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfTysXXspec}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \overline{A}  = \{ \ottnt{Pf} \} }%
}{
 \overline{A}  = \{  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau ,  \ottnt{Pf}  \} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfTys\_spec}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfTysXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \overline{A}  = \{ \ottnt{Pf} \} }%
}{
 \overline{A}  = \{  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}],  \ottnt{Pf}  \} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfTys\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfTysXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \overline{A}  = \{ \ottnt{Pf} \} }%
}{
 \overline{A}  = \{  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}],  \ottnt{Pf}  \} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfTys\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnpfXXtypes}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \overline{A}  = \{ \ottnt{Pf} \} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfTysXXnil{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfTysXXpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfTysXXspec{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfTysXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfTysXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rsig_erase
\newcommand{\ottdruleRSEraseXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \cdot   = \mathsf{Comp}(  \cdot  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSErase\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSEraseXXext}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r ) }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{F}  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{F} ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSErase\_ext}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSEraseXXfundef}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r ) }%
}{
  \Sigma_c , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}   = \mathsf{Comp}(  \Sigma_r , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSErase\_fundef}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSEraseXXrfun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \overline{A}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  = \{ \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \}  \quad  \ottnt{A}  = \mathsf{Prod}( \overline{A}_{{\mathrm{1}}} )  \quad  \overline{A}_{{\mathrm{2}}}  = \{ \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \}  \quad  \ottnt{B}  = \mathsf{Prod}( \overline{A}_{{\mathrm{2}}} ) }%
}{
 \Sigma_c  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{B}   = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \multimap  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack  ) }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSErase\_rfun}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrsigXXerase}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r ) $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSEraseXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSEraseXXext{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSEraseXXfundef{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSEraseXXrfun{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rsig_wf
\newcommand{\ottdruleRSWfXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \vdash   \cdot   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSWf\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSWfXXext}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \vdash  \Sigma_r  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \vdash  \Sigma_r  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{F}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSWf\_ext}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSWfXXfundef}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \vdash  \Sigma_r  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }%
}{
 \vdash   \Sigma_r , \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottmv{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce}   \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSWf\_fundef}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSWfXXrfun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \vdash  \Sigma_r  \;\mathsf{wf}  \quad  \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottnt{RF}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
}{
 \vdash  \Sigma_r  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{RF}  \;\mathsf{wf} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSWf\_rfun}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrsigXXwf}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \vdash  \Sigma_r  \;\mathsf{wf} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSWfXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSWfXXext{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSWfXXfundef{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSWfXXrfun{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn lpf_synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleLSynXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}] \in  \Delta }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta  \leadsto   \top  }{%
{\ottdrulename{LSyn\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleLSynXXunfold}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \ottmv{f} ( \ottkw{x}  :  \tau ) \to_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau'  =  \ottnt{ce'}  \in  \Sigma_c  \quad  \ottnt{eff}  \leq   \mathbf{S}  }%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \mathsf{unfold}\; \ottmv{f} ( \ottnt{ce} )   \Rightarrow   \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{ce}  \ottsym{)}  \doteq   [  \ottnt{ce}  /  \ottmv{x}  ]  \ottnt{ce'}    \dashv  \Delta  \leadsto   \top  }{%
{\ottdrulename{LSyn\_unfold}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleLSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{LSyn\_annot}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleLSynXXopenret}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Rightarrow  \ottkw{return} \, \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \mathsf{open\text{-}ret}\; \ottnt{rpf}   \Rightarrow   \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce'}   \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{LSyn\_openret}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnlpfXXsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleLSynXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleLSynXXunfold{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleLSynXXannot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleLSynXXopenret{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn lpf_check
\newcommand{\ottdruleLChkXXauto}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \mathsf{auto}   \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta  \leadsto   \ottnt{ce}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{LChk\_auto}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleLChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}  \wedge  \ottsym{(}   \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \ottsym{(}   \ottnt{ce'}   \ottsym{)}   \ottsym{)}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{LChk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnlpfXXcheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleLChkXXauto{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleLChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn res_lookup
\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXthereXXeff}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \neq  \ottmv{y}  \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;   \Delta ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv   \Delta' ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_there\_eff}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXthereXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \neq  \ottmv{y}  \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;   \Delta ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce''}  \; [\mathsf{log}]   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv   \Delta' ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce''}  \; [\mathsf{log}]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_there\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXthereXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \neq  \ottmv{y}  \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;   \Delta ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce''}  @  \ottnt{ce'''}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )]   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv   \Delta' ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce''}  @  \ottnt{ce'''}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_there\_res}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRLkXXhere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{u}  \in \{1, ?\} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )]   \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  0  )]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RLk\_here}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnresXXlookup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXthereXXeff{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXthereXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXthereXXres{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRLkXXhere{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rpf_synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleRSynXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \top  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSyn\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \ottnt{rpf}  :  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}   \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RSyn\_annot}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrpfXXsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSynXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRSynXXannot{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rpf_check
\newcommand{\ottdruleRChkXXmakeret}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Leftarrow   \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \mathsf{make\text{-}ret}\; \ottnt{lpf}   \Leftarrow  \ottkw{return} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RChk\_makeret}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRChkXXmaketake}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau ,   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  @  \ottmv{x}  \; [\mathsf{res}],   \ottmv{z}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \; [\mathsf{res}],   \cdot      \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \mathsf{make\text{-}take}\; \ottnt{crt}   \Leftarrow  \ottkw{take} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RChk\_maketake}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce'_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce'_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \ottsym{(}   \mathcal{C}  \wedge   \ottsym{(}   \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \ottsym{)}    \ottsym{)}  \wedge   \ottsym{(}   \ottnt{ce'_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce'_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \ottsym{)}   }{%
{\ottdrulename{RChk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrpfXXcheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRChkXXmakeret{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRChkXXmaketake{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn pf_eq
\newcommand{\ottdrulePfEqXXnil}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \cdot   =   \cdot   \leadsto   \top  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfEq\_nil}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfEqXXcomp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \vdash  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  =   [  \ottmv{x}  /  \ottmv{y}  ]  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau ,  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   =   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau ,  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \leadsto   \forall  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \tau . \,  \mathcal{C}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfEq\_comp}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfEqXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  =  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \; [\mathsf{log}],  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   =   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; [\mathsf{log}],  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \leadsto   \ottsym{(}   \ottsym{(}   \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \ottsym{)}   \ottsym{)}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfEq\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePfEqXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  =  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce'_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \; [\mathsf{res}],  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   =   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce'_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; [\mathsf{res}],  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \leadsto   \ottsym{(}   \ottsym{(}   \ottsym{(}   \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \ottsym{)}   \ottsym{)}  \wedge   \ottsym{(}   \ottnt{ce'_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce'_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \ottsym{)}    \ottsym{)}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{PfEq\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnpfXXeq}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  =  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfEqXXnil{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfEqXXcomp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfEqXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePfEqXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn ctx_merge
\newcommand{\ottdruleMergeXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \cdot   \sqcap   \cdot   =   \cdot  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Merge\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleMergeXXeff}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}}  \sqcap  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  =  \Delta }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}} ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \sqcap   \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   =   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Merge\_eff}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleMergeXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}}  \sqcap  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  =  \Delta }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}} ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]   \sqcap   \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]   =   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Merge\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleMergeXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}}  \sqcap  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  =  \Delta  \quad  \ottnt{u}  =  \ottnt{u_{{\mathrm{0}}}}  \sqcap  \ottnt{u_{{\mathrm{1}}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash   \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}} ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u_{{\mathrm{0}}}} )]   \sqcap   \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u_{{\mathrm{1}}}} )]   =   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}( \ottnt{u} )]  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Merge\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnctxXXmerge}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}}  \sqcap  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  =  \Delta $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleMergeXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleMergeXXeff{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleMergeXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleMergeXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rpat_match
\newcommand{\ottdruleRPMXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   ()   :   \cdot   \dashv   \cdot  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RPM\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRPMXXcomp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;   \Gamma ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \vdash  \ottnt{q}  :   [  \ottmv{x}  /  \ottmv{y}  ]  \ottnt{Pf}   \dashv  \Delta }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{q}  \ottsym{)}  :   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau ,  \ottnt{Pf}   \dashv    \cdot  ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau   \ottsym{,}  \Delta }{%
{\ottdrulename{RPM\_comp}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRPMXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{q}  :   [  \ottmv{x}  /  \ottmv{y}  ]  \ottnt{Pf}   \dashv  \Delta }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{q}  \ottsym{)}  :   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}],  \ottnt{Pf}   \dashv    \cdot  ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}]   \ottsym{,}  \Delta }{%
{\ottdrulename{RPM\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRPMXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{q}  :   [  \ottmv{x}  /  \ottmv{y}  ]  \ottnt{Pf}   \dashv  \Delta }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{q}  \ottsym{)}  :   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}],  \ottnt{Pf}   \dashv    \cdot  ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  1  )]   \ottsym{,}  \Delta }{%
{\ottdrulename{RPM\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrpatXXmatch}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{q}  :  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRPMXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRPMXXcomp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRPMXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRPMXXres{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rcrt_synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleRCSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{Pf}  \;\mathsf{wf} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{Pf}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCSyn\_annot}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRCSynXXcall}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{RF}  \quad  \ottnt{eff'}  \in \{\mathbf{S}, \lfloor  \ottnt{eff}  \rfloor\} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :  \ottnt{RF}  \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{rsp}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCSyn\_call}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRCSynXXprimapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  \in \{\mathbf{S}, \lfloor  \ottnt{eff}  \rfloor\} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :  \ottnt{RF}  \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{prim} \, \ottnt{rsp}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCSyn\_primapp}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRCSynXXopentake}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Rightarrow  \ottkw{take} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \mathsf{open\text{-}take}\; \ottnt{rpf}   \Rightarrow   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \tau ,   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  @  \ottmv{x}  \; [\mathsf{res}],   \ottmv{z}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \; [\mathsf{res}],   \cdot      \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCSyn\_opentake}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrcrtXXsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCSynXXannot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCSynXXcall{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCSynXXprimapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCSynXXopentake{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn case_branch
\newcommand{\ottdruleCBrXXbranch}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} }%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma_c}%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;    \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}   \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \ottmv{L} \, \ottmv{x}   \; [\mathsf{log}]   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv    \Delta' ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau  ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}   \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \ottmv{L} \, \ottmv{x}   \; [\mathsf{log}]   \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \;\mathsf{is}\;  \ottmv{L} \, \ottmv{x}  \to  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \forall  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \tau . \,    \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \ottmv{L} \, \ottmv{x}   \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}   }{%
{\ottdrulename{CBr\_branch}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncaseXXbranch}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \;\mathsf{is}\;  \ottmv{L} \, \ottmv{x}  \to  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCBrXXbranch{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn rcrt_check
\newcommand{\ottdruleRCChkXXlet}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{Pf'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta' |  \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{q}  :  \ottnt{Pf'}  \dashv  \Delta'' }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta'  \ottsym{,}  \Delta''  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'''  \ottsym{,}  \Delta''''  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{len}( \Delta' ) = \mathsf{len}( \Delta''' ) }%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{len}( \Delta'' ) = \mathsf{len}( \Delta'''' ) }%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{zero}( \Delta'''' ) }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottkw{let} \, \ottnt{q}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'''  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{2}}}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCChk\_let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRCChkXXif}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{bool}  }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}   \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \mathsf{true}   \; [\mathsf{log}]   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv   \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}} ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}   \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \mathsf{true}   \; [\mathsf{log}]   \leadsto  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;   \Delta ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}   \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \mathsf{false}   \; [\mathsf{log}]   \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv   \Delta_{{\mathrm{2}}} ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}   \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \mathsf{false}   \; [\mathsf{log}]   \leadsto  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{2}}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \sqcap  \Delta_{{\mathrm{2}}}  =  \Delta' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottkw{if} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{ce} \, \ottkw{then} \, \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottkw{else} \, \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \ottsym{(}    \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \mathsf{true}   \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}}   \ottsym{)}  \wedge  \ottsym{(}    \ottnt{ce}  \doteq  \mathsf{false}   \Rightarrow  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{2}}}   \ottsym{)}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCChk\_if}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRCChkXXcase}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{eff'}  = \lfloor  \ottnt{eff}  \rfloor }%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} }%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \in \, \Sigma_c}%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \;\mathsf{is}\;  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \to  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff'} }  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \;\mathsf{is}\;  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}} \, \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \to  \ottnt{crt_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta_{\ottmv{n}}  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}_{\ottmv{n}} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash \sqcap  \ottsym{(}  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{;} \, .. \, \ottsym{;}  \Delta_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)}  =  \Delta' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottkw{case} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{ce} \, \ottkw{of} \, \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}} \, \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{crt_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}_{\ottmv{n}}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCChk\_case}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRCChkXXiter}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \mathsf{type}\;  \ottmv{D} (  \ottmv{a} ,  \ottmv{b} ) = \{ \mathsf{Next}\mathord{:} \ottmv{a}  \mid \mathsf{Done}\mathord{:} \ottmv{b}  \} \in  \Sigma_c }%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{S}  }  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{pred}\; \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{B}  \ottsym{)}  }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{A} ,   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottmv{Next} \, \ottmv{x}  \; [\mathsf{res}],   \cdot     \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;    \Delta' ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{A}  ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottmv{Next} \, \ottmv{x}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  1  )]   \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow   \ottmv{z}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{B}  \ottsym{)} ,   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottmv{z}  \; [\mathsf{res}],   \cdot     \dashv    \Delta' ,  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{A}  ,  \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottmv{Next} \, \ottmv{x}  \; [\mathsf{res}(  1  )]   \leadsto  \mathcal{C}' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottkw{iter} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{ce}  \ottsym{]}  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{q}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{crt_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow   \ottmv{z}  \mathord{:}_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B} ,   \ottmv{y}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottmv{Done} \, \ottmv{z}  \; [\mathsf{res}],   \cdot     \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}  \wedge   \forall  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A} . \,  \mathcal{C}'   }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCChk\_iter}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRCChkXXexfalso}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Delta'  = \mathsf{affinize}( \Delta ) }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \mathsf{exfalso}   \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \bot  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCChk\_exfalso}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleRCChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{Pf'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta'  \vdash  \ottnt{Pf'}  =  \ottnt{Pf}  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}'  }{%
{\ottdrulename{RCChk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnrcrtXXcheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{crt}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCChkXXlet{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCChkXXif{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCChkXXcase{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCChkXXiter{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCChkXXexfalso{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleRCChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn spine_check
\newcommand{\ottdruleSpineXXnil}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \cdot   :    \cdot   \multimap  \ottnt{Pf}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack   \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta  \leadsto   \top  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Spine\_nil}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpineXXcore}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Gamma  = | \Delta |  \quad  \Sigma_c  = \mathsf{Comp}( \Sigma_r )  \quad  \Sigma_c  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :    [  \ottnt{ce}  /  \ottmv{x}  ]  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \multimap   [  \ottnt{ce}  /  \ottmv{x}  ]  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack   \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{ce}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{rsp}  :    \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \tau ,  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \multimap  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack   \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Spine\_core}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpineXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{lpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta'  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :   \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \multimap  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack   \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta''  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{lpf}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{rsp}  :    \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}],  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \multimap  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack   \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta''  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}'  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Spine\_log}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpineXXres}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta'  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :   \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \multimap  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack   \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta''  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rpf}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{rsp}  :    \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  @  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; [\mathsf{res}],  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \multimap  \ottnt{Pf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \; \lbrack  \ottnt{eff}  \rbrack   \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta''  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}'  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Spine\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnspineXXcheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :  \ottnt{RF}  \gg  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpineXXnil{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpineXXcore{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpineXXlog{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpineXXres{}}

}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }   \cdot   :   \cdot   \dashv  \Delta  \leadsto   \top  }{%

\newcommand{\ottdruleTupXXcore}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%

}{

}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleTupXXlog}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%

\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta'  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta''  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{lpf}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{rsp}  :   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  \; [\mathsf{log}],  \ottnt{Pf}   \dashv  \Delta''  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}'  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Tup\_log}}{}%
}}

\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash  \ottnt{rpf}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} }%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta'  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta''  \leadsto  \mathcal{C}' }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rpf}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{rsp}  :   \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{ce}  @  \ottnt{ce'}  \; [\mathsf{res}],  \ottnt{Pf}   \dashv  \Delta''  \leadsto   \mathcal{C}  \wedge  \mathcal{C}'  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Tup\_res}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefntupleXXcheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  ;  \Delta  \vdash_{ \ottnt{eff} }  \ottnt{rsp}  :  \ottnt{Pf}  \dashv  \Delta'  \leadsto  \mathcal{C} $}{}

%% defn nary_merge
\newcommand{\ottdruleNMergeXXbase}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash \sqcap  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}}  \ottsym{;}   \cdot   =  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}} }{%
{\ottdrulename{NMerge\_base}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleNMergeXXstep}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma_r  \vdash  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}}  \sqcap  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  =  \Delta'  \quad  \Sigma_r  \vdash \sqcap  \ottsym{(}  \Delta'  \ottsym{;}  \overline{\Delta}  \ottsym{)}  =  \Delta }%
}{
 \Sigma_r  \vdash \sqcap  \ottsym{(}  \Delta_{{\mathrm{0}}}  \ottsym{;}  \Delta_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{;}  \overline{\Delta}  \ottsym{)}  =  \Delta }{%
{\ottdrulename{NMerge\_step}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnnaryXXmerge}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma_r  \vdash \sqcap  \overline{\Delta}  =  \Delta $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleNMergeXXbase{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleNMergeXXstep{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}
